escalation.rationale: US-Israeli ceasefire with Lebanon collapsed as Israel resumed bombing, while Iran threatens to close Bab el-Mandeb Strait after 100 days of war.

ticker_items: Israeli strikes resume in southern Lebanon after ceasefire collapse
Iran threatens closure of Bab el-Mandeb Strait amid oil price surge
Xi Jinping to visit North Korea June 8-9, first trip since 2019
Hezbollah rejects US-mediated ceasefire as Israel-favoring deal
Iran condemns alleged US-Israeli nuclear terrorism at facilities

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian drones struck oil terminal near St. Petersburg exposing Russian defense gaps.
Ukrainian forces conducted strikes during Russia's economic forum

middle_east.description: Seven Iranian ballistic missiles fired towards Kuwait and Bahrain, intercepted by US forces.
US military strikes hit Iranian radar sites on Goruk and Qeshm Island.
Israeli airstrikes hit Burj al-Shemaly, Mayfadoun and other southern Lebanese towns killing eight civilians.
Israeli warplanes resumed bombing southern Lebanon killing at least eight civilians
Hezbollah launched coordinated rocket and drone attacks on Israeli military positions
Israeli air strike killed groom hours before his wedding

russia.text: I see no point in meeting his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky until a peace deal is ready.
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

russia.text: Russia will strengthen its air defenses to counter recent Ukrainian drone attacks.
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

russia.text: No point in meeting his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky until a peace deal is ready
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

ukraine.text: Calls for face-to-face negotiations with Russian President Vladimir Putin in a neutral country.
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President

middle_east.text: Netanyahu says IDF won't withdraw from southern Lebanon in the near future
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Israeli Prime Minister

middle_east.text: The international community must adopt a zero-tolerance policy towards any armed attack on peaceful nuclear installations
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government representatives

observers.description: Xi Jinping scheduled to visit North Korea June 8-9 for first time in seven years. Visit comes as Pyongyang strengthens relations with Russia amid ongoing conflicts.

House Republicans defied Trump to pass Ukraine aid package with military aid and Russia sanctions. US forces intercepted Iranian missile attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain while striking Iranian radar sites.

Chancellor Friedrich Merz has drastically changed his stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran after 100 days of conflict. Germany continues to assess lessons learned from the prolonged Middle East war.

The EU is considering limiting refugee protections for military-age Ukrainian men, stating that more men should stay in Ukraine to fight. This represents a shift in refugee policy amid the ongoing war.

financial.notes: Oil prices expected to double as Iran threatens closure of Bab el-Mandeb Strait, potentially sending global economy into recession.

update_log.text: Israeli warplanes resumed bombing southern Lebanon after US-brokered ceasefire collapsed
Iran threatens to close Bab el-Mandeb Strait as oil markets surge
Xi Jinping announced visit to North Korea for June 8-9, first trip since 2019
Hezbollah launched coordinated rocket and drone attacks on Israeli positions
Iran condemns alleged US-Israeli nuclear terrorism at peaceful facilities
US intercepts seven Iranian ballistic missiles targeting Kuwait and Bahrain.
Ukrainian drones hit oil terminal near St. Petersburg during economic forum.
Zelenskyy calls for direct Putin negotiations in neutral country via public letter.
